top_signals.title: Bumper US non-farm payrolls in May confirm Fed rate cuts are off the table
top_signals.summary: Job gains were twice what was expected in May and unemployment rate was unchanged
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Rieder Likens US Economy a 'Three Month Old Birthday Cake'
top_signals.summary: BlackRock Global Fixed Income CIO Rick Rieder says the US economy is tricky right now, comparing it to a three-month-old birthday cake where the icing tastes great but underneath isn't so good. Speaking with Matt Miller on "Bloomberg Open Interest," Rieder says AI will change the ecosystem and the Federal Reserve should pull back a bit to evaluate. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Dutch plant for combat-zone robots offers fresh supply pipeline for Ukraine
top_signals.summary: The facility has already produced its first THeMIS vehicle for the Dutch government, part of a run of more than 100 such robots pledged by the Netherlands.
